tagline: Manufacturer and traders of shipping containers and Porta cabins
heroHeadline: Your site infrastructure. Manufactured, delivered, ready.
heroSubtext: End-to-end portable cabins and containers — from our Greater Noida factory to your construction, industrial, or commercial site. No running around.

howItWorks.title: Share your requirement
howItWorks.headline: Tell us what you need and we're ready to help.
howItWorks.desc: Reach out via phone, WhatsApp, or our quote form. Tell us your cabin or container needs, dimensions, and timeline — our team confirms your request quickly.

howItWorks.title: Get quote & design
howItWorks.headline: Receive a clear quote tailored to your site.
howItWorks.desc: Our team confirms specifications, shares a transparent quote, and finalizes the design for your portable cabin or container requirements.

howItWorks.title: Manufacture & deliver
howItWorks.headline: We build at our factory and deliver to your site.
howItWorks.desc: We manufacture at our Greater Noida facility with factory QC checks, then coordinate logistics for pan-India delivery — ready for immediate deployment.

howItWorks.title: Install & handover
howItWorks.headline: Your unit is placed, connected, and site-ready.
howItWorks.desc: Our team supports on-site placement and basic setup so your portable office, guard cabin, or container is ready to use from day one.

urgentCta.title: Need portable cabins on urgent basis?
urgentCta.description: We provide fast and reliable manufacturing and delivery whenever your project timeline is tight.

contactCta.title: Confused about size, specs, or delivery?
contactCta.description: Talk to our team for a free site consultation. We'll help you choose the right cabin or container and share a transparent quote — no obligation.

faqs.q: What products does Aronix Infra manufacture?
faqs.a: We manufacture and supply portable workstation cabins, security guard cabins, portable site offices, prefabricated structures, used shipping and storage containers, and FRP modular toilets.

faqs.q: What is the typical delivery timeline?
faqs.a: Most standard portable cabins and containers are delivered within 7–15 days depending on specifications, quantity, and delivery location across India.
Yes. Aronix Infra provides pan-India delivery with reliable logistics for industrial, construction, and commercial projects.

faqs.q: Can I get a custom-sized portable cabin?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer tailored solutions based on your site requirements, including custom dimensions, layouts, and material specifications.

faqs.q: How do I get a quote?
faqs.a: Call us, message on WhatsApp, or use the Get a Quote button on this website. Share your requirements and we will respond with a detailed quote.
Yes. Aronix Infra is GST registered (09ACCFA4106B1Z3) and MSME approved, with IndiaMART Trust Seal verification.

aboutText: Aronix Infra is a dynamic manufacturer and supplier dedicated to delivering high-quality, reliable portable infrastructure solutions that meet the evolving needs of today's industrial, construction, and commercial environments. Founded in 2023 and based in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, we have built a reputation for excellence by combining engineering precision, efficient production processes, and customer-focused services. Our product range spans portable workstation cabins, security guard cabins, portable site offices, prefabricated structures, used shipping and storage containers, and FRP modular toilets—each designed for durability, mobility, and adaptability. At the heart of our operations lies a commitment to quality. We use premium materials, apply rigorous manufacturing standards, and maintain an operational setup that supports both large-scale orders and tailored solutions. With our skilled team and responsive logistics, we ensure timely delivery and dependable service across diverse project requirements.

ceo.name: Vijay Kumar
ceo.bio: Vijay Kumar, Founder and Director of Aronix Infra, brings over 7 years of experience in the portable infrastructure and modular building industry. With a strong understanding of site needs, materials, and manufacturing, he has built the company on values of quality, reliability, and trust. His practical approach and focus on client satisfaction have helped Aronix Infra deliver smart, durable, and cost-effective solutions across India.

whyChooseUs.title: Container Offices & Porta Cabins in India
whyChooseUs.intro: Aronix Infra is India's trusted manufacturer of container offices and portable cabins. We deliver high-quality cabins and containers faster, combining durability, modern design, and cost efficiency. Every project is executed with precision, speed, and attention to detail.

prefabComparison.title: Prefab Construction vs Traditional Construction
prefabComparison.intro: Prefab construction offers unmatched speed, quality, and flexibility compared to traditional methods.
benefits: Faster Completion: Ready in weeks, not months.
Cost Savings: Up to 40 percent lower total cost.
Weather Independence: Built indoors for zero weather delays.
Superior Quality Control: Factory-tested precision and consistency.
Minimal Waste: Reduced material wastage and cleaner process.
Flexible and Portable: Easily relocatable and expandable.
prefabComparison.traditional: Traditional construction, on the other hand, is slower, weather-dependent, costlier, and generates higher waste.
traditionalPoints: More material waste and site disruption
